_template_notes.purpose: Template only: this file is governance scaffolding and not a list of approved images.
_template_notes.required_review: Every real image requires source, licence, attribution, watermark, and patient identity-risk review before use.
_template_notes.separate_permissions: Evidence-source permission and image reuse permission are separate checks and both must be verified.
_template_notes.publication_gate: No image should be published unless licensing status and identity-risk review are acceptable.
